  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of respondent\'s mailing address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of respondent\'s mailing address.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of residence.']
  consent_given_date date [note: 'Date when the respondent gave consent for participation.']
  consent_revoked_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the respondent has revoked consent.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of respondent.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the respondent record was first created.']
  date_of_birth date [note: 'Birth date of the respondent.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Primary device type used for online surveys.']
  education_level varchar [note: 'Highest education level attained by the respondent.']
  email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for contacting the respondent.']
  ethnicity varchar [note: 'Self‑reported ethnicity of the respondent.']
  external_code varchar [note: 'External identifier from third‑party panel provider.']
  full_name varchar [note: 'Legal full name of the respondent.']
  gender varchar [note: 'Self‑reported gender of the respondent.']
  household_size varchar [note: 'Number of individuals in the respondent\'s household.']
  income_bracket varchar [note: 'Income bracket category of the respondent.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'Last known IP address used during survey participation.']
  language_preference varchar [note: 'Preferred language for survey communications.']
  last_participation_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent survey completed by the respondent.']
  marital_status varchar [note: 'Marital status of the respondent.']
  opt_out_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the respondent opted out of future research contact.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary phone number of the respondent.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code of the respondent\'s address.']
  preferred_contact_method varchar [note: 'Preferred method for contacting the respondent.']
  recruitment_source varchar [note: 'Source through which the respondent was recruited (e.g., online panel, social media, referral).']
  region varchar [note: 'Broad geographic region of the respondent.']
  respondent_type varchar [note: 'Category of respondent based on role in research.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system of record for the respondent data.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of residence.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the respondent.']
  survey_participation_count varchar [note: 'Total number of surveys the respondent has completed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the respondent record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for respondent. Referenced by respondent_id.'
}

Table research.sample {
  sample_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for sample']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project to which the sample belongs.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external supplier providing the raw material.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturing batch identifier associated with the sample.']
  code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the sample in lab systems.']
  collected_by varchar [note: 'Name of the person who collected the sample.']
  collection_location varchar [note: 'Lab or facility where the sample was collected.']
  collection_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the sample was collected.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sample meets all applicable compliance requirements.']
  concentration_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Concentration of active ingredient expressed as a percentage.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the sample, including purpose and key characteristics.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date after which the sample is considered expired for testing.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Safety hazard level associated with the sample.']
  is_control boolean [note: 'True if the sample is a control/reference specimen used for assay validation.']
  material_category varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the material type of the sample.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the sample.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional observations or comments recorded by lab personnel.']
  quality_status varchar [note: 'Result of quality assessment performed on the sample.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the sample record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the sample record.']
  regulatory_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory review outcome for the sample.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current state of the sample within the development workflow.']
  storage_condition varchar [note: 'Environmental condition required for sample storage.']
  storage_temperature_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the sample is stored, expressed in degrees Celsius.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the sample indicating its role in the R&D process.']
  volume_ml decimal(10,2) [note: 'Physical volume of the sample in milliliters.']
  weight_g decimal(10,2) [note: 'Weight of the sample in grams.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for sample. Referenced by sample_id.'
}

Table research.patent_family {
  patent_family_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for patent_family']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the lead inventor.']
  parent_patent_family_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on patent_family (parent_patent_family_id)']
  assignee_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the assignee organization.']
  assignee_name varchar [note: 'Name of the organization owning the patent family.']
  confidentiality_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when confidentiality ends.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was created.']
  description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the patent family.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the patent family expires.']
  family_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier/code for the patent family.']
  family_name varchar [note: 'Human readable name of the patent family.']
  family_type varchar [note: 'Category of patents in the family.']
  filing_date date [note: 'Date of the earliest filing within the family.']
  grant_date date [note: 'Date of the earliest grant within the family.']
  ipc_classification varchar [note: 'IPC code representing the technical field.']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Indicates if the patent family details are confidential.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Country code of the primary jurisdiction for the family.']
  keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated keywords describing the family.']
  licensing_status varchar [note: 'Current licensing status of the patent family.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Primary market region for the patented products.']
  number_of_patents varchar [note: 'Total count of individual patents within the family.']
  primary_inventor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead inventor for the family.']
  priority_date date [note: 'Date of the priority filing.']
  priority_number varchar [note: 'Priority filing number for the family.']
  related_product_codes varchar [note: 'Identifiers of consumer goods linked to the patent family.']
  royalty_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for royalty payments.']
  royalty_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Royalty rate applicable to licensed patents (percentage).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the patent family.']
  strategic_importance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score (0-100) indicating strategic value of the family.']
  technology_area varchar [note: 'Broad technology domain of the patent family (e.g., cosmetics, cleaning).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for patent_family. Referenced by patent_family_id.'
}

Table research.panel_session {
  panel_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for panel_session']
  followup_panel_session_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on panel_session (followup_panel_session_id)']
  panel_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the consumer panel participating in the session.']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research project to which the session belongs.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance status of the session.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the session record was first created.']
  data_collection_method varchar [note: 'Method(s) used to capture data during the session.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the session purpose and design.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device participants used to join the session.']
  duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Planned length of the session in minutes.']
  end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the session ended.']
  incentive_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary incentive offered to each participant.']
  language varchar [note: 'Primary language used during the session.']
  location varchar [note: 'Physical or virtual location where the session took place.']
  moderator_name varchar [note: 'Name of the moderator or facilitator leading the session.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes captured by researchers.']
  recruitment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to recruit participants for the session.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of participants scheduled for the session.']
  session_code varchar [note: 'External or legacy code used to reference the session.']
  session_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the panel session.']
  session_type varchar [note: 'Category of the research session.']
  start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the session started.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the session.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system that last updated the session record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the session record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system that created the session record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for panel_session. Referenced by panel_session_id.'
}

Table regulatory.regulatory_registration {
  regulatory_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the product registration record. Primary key for the registration entity.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Financial posting of registration fees requires a GL account; finance uses GL accounts for all fee postings.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing facility or establishment where the registered product is manufactured. Links to facility master data.']
  responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Registration approval requires a designated regulatory affairs employee; linking enables audit trail of responsible employee.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product being registered with regulatory authorities. Links to the product master record.']
  active_ingredients varchar [note: 'List of active ingredients or substances covered by this registration, using INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients) or CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service) numbers where applicable. Critical for EPA pesticide and antimicrobial registrations.']
  annual_report_due_date date [note: 'Date by which annual registration reports or updates must be submitted to the regulatory authority. Used for compliance tracking and reporting calendar management.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory authority officially approved the registration application.']
  cfr_citation varchar [note: 'Specific CFR (Code of Federal Regulations) citation or section under which the product is registered (e.g., 21 CFR 314 for NDAs, 40 CFR 152 for pesticides). Applicable primarily to US registrations.']
  cpsc_tracking_label_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether CPSC tracking label requirements apply to this registered product. True if tracking labels are required, False otherwise. Applicable to children\'s products and certain consumer goods.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this registration record was first created in the system. Audit trail field for data lineage and compliance.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the registration becomes legally effective and the product may be marketed or distributed under this registration.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the registration expires and is no longer valid unless renewed. Null for registrations with indefinite validity.']
  fee_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total fee amount paid or payable for this registration in the registration holder\'s reporting currency. Includes initial registration fees and any applicable renewal fees.']
  fee_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the registration fee amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP, CAD).']
  gmp_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product and manufacturing facility meet Good Manufacturing Practice requirements as verified during registration. True if GMP-compliant, False otherwise.']
  holder_address varchar [note: 'Full business address of the registration holder as registered with the regulatory authority. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  holder_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the company or entity that holds the registration. This is the registrant of record with the regulatory authority.']
  ifra_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product formulation complies with IFRA standards for fragrance ingredients. True if IFRA-compliant, False otherwise. Relevant for cosmetic and personal care products.']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the jurisdiction where the registration is valid (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR, CAN, BRA, JPN, AUS, CHN).']
  jurisdiction_region varchar [note: 'Specific region, state, or province within the country where the registration applies (e.g., California, Ontario, Bavaria). Used for sub-national regulatory requirements.']
  label_approval_number varchar [note: 'Approval number for the product label as reviewed and accepted by the regulatory authority. Critical for EPA pesticide registrations where label claims are strictly regulated.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who last modified this registration record. Audit trail field for accountability and compliance.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this registration record was last modified or updated. Audit trail field for change tracking and compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special conditions related to the registration. May include restrictions, special handling requirements, or regulatory caveats.']
  post_market_surveillance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether post-market surveillance or pharmacovigilance reporting is required for this registration. True if surveillance is required, False otherwise.']
  product_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the product scope covered by this registration, including specific formulations, SKUs (Stock Keeping Units), or product variants included under this registration.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'EU REACH registration number for chemical substances. Applicable for products containing substances subject to REACH regulation in the European Union.']
  registering_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or governing body with which the product is registered (e.g., FDA, EPA, EU Commission, Health Canada, ANVISA). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EPA|CPSC|EU_REACH|Health_Canada|ANVISA|PMDA|TGA|SFDA|MHRA|BfR — promote to reference product]']
  registration_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory category or class of the registration as defined by the authority (e.g., OTC drug, prescription drug, general use pesticide, restricted use pesticide, cosmetic product, biocidal product).']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration number or identifier issued by the regulatory authority. This is the externally-known unique identifier for the registration (e.g., FDA registration number, EPA registration number, EU REACH registration number).']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the registration. Tracks the registration through submission, review, approval, active use, and potential suspension or expiration. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|active|suspended|expired|cancelled|rejected — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Type of registration action being recorded. Indicates whether this is a new registration, renewal of existing registration, amendment to existing registration, cancellation, variation, or transfer to another entity.']
  regulatory_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary regulatory affairs contact person for this registration. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  regulatory_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary regulatory affairs contact person responsible for this registration. Used for correspondence and regulatory inquiries.']
  regulatory_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary regulatory affairs contact person for this registration. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  renewal_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the registration renewal application must be submitted to maintain continuous registration status. Used for proactive renewal management.']
  sds_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or document number for the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) associated with this registered product. Links to safety documentation repository.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this registration record originated (e.g., Veeva Vault, SAP ERP, Oracle ERP). Used for data lineage and integration tracking.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date when the registration application or dossier was submitted to the regulatory authority.']
  submission_reference_number varchar [note: 'Internal or external reference number for the regulatory submission dossier associated with this registration. Links to detailed submission documentation.']
  use_classification varchar [note: 'Classification of the intended use or application of the product as defined by the regulatory authority (e.g., cosmetic, drug, pesticide, antimicrobial, food contact substance, medical device). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cosmetic|drug|pesticide|antimicrobial|food_contact|medical_device|biocide|industrial_chemical — promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Master record for product registrations with regulatory authorities across all jurisdictions. Tracks registration number, status, effective/expiry dates, registering authority, product scope, registration type (new, renewal, amendment, cancellation), active ingredients, use classification, submission reference, and renewal due date. Covers FDA, EPA (FIFRA pesticide/antimicrobial), CPSC, EU REACH, and country-specific registrations. SSOT for all regulatory registration identities regardless of authority or jurisdiction.'
}

Table regulatory.submission {
  submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory submission record. Primary key.']
  assigned_reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Regulatory submission review is performed by a specific employee; FK supports reviewer assignment tracking.']
  previous_submission_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the prior submission record that this submission amends, supersedes, or follows up on.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.rd_project. Business justification: Regulatory submissions are initiated by a specific R&D project; tracking rd_project_id enables the Submission Tracking Report linking project milestones to submission status.']
  regulatory_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the product registration record that this submission supports or updates.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the product or SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) that is the subject of this regulatory submission.']
  actual_decision_date date [note: 'Actual date on which the regulatory authority issued a final decision (approval, rejection, or other outcome) on the submission.']
  authority_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the jurisdiction of the regulatory authority (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR, CAN).']
  channel varchar [note: 'Channel or method through which the submission was filed (electronic, paper, regulatory portal, EDI electronic data interchange).']
  contact_person_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the internal regulatory affairs contact person for correspondence related to this submission.']
  contact_person_name varchar [note: 'Name of the internal regulatory affairs contact person or responsible party for this submission.']
  contact_person_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the internal regulatory affairs contact person for inquiries related to this submission.']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Description of the corrective action required or implemented in response to the submission (e.g., voluntary recall, labeling update, product reformulation).']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the regulatory authority has mandated corrective action (recall, labeling change, product modification) as a result of this submission.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the submission record was first created in the regulatory management system.']
  decision_outcome varchar [note: 'Final outcome or decision rendered by the regulatory authority (approved, approved with conditions, rejected, withdrawn, pending).']
  dossier_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking this submission to the master regulatory dossier or product registration file maintained in the regulatory document management system.']
  fee_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Regulatory filing fee amount charged by the authority for processing the submission.']
  fee_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the regulatory filing fee (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  fee_payment_status varchar [note: 'Payment status of the regulatory filing fee (paid, pending, waived, refunded).']
  hazard_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the hazard, incident, or safety concern that prompted the submission (applicable for CPSC Section 15(b) reports, SaferProducts.gov filings, and post-market surveillance submissions).']
  incident_date date [note: 'Date on which the reported incident, adverse event, or safety issue occurred (applicable for safety-related submissions).']
  language varchar [note: 'Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code representing the primary language in which the submission was prepared and filed (e.g., en for English, de for German, fr for French).']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who last modified the submission record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the submission record was last updated or modified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments regarding the submission, including internal observations, authority feedback, or follow-up actions required.']
  population_at_risk varchar [note: 'Estimated number of consumers or units in the market that may be affected by the reported hazard or safety issue (applicable for safety-related submissions).']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the submission by the regulatory authority or internal regulatory affairs team (expedited, standard, routine).']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the governing body or regulatory authority to which the submission was filed (e.g., FDA, EPA, CPSC, European Chemicals Agency, Health Canada).']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Assessed severity level of the hazard or incident reported in the submission (critical, high, medium, low).']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the submission was officially filed with the regulatory authority.']
  submission_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique submission number or dossier reference assigned by the regulatory authority or internal tracking system (e.g., 510(k) number, PMA number, REACH registration number).']
  submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory submission (draft, submitted, under review, additional information requested, approved, rejected, withdrawn). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|additional_info_requested|approved|rejected|withdrawn — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Type of regulatory submission filed (510(k) premarket notification, PMA premarket approval, GRAS generally recognized as safe, TSCA toxic substances control act, cosmetic notification, CPSC Section 15(b) report, SaferProducts.gov incident report, REACH registration). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: 510k|pma|gras|tsca|cosmetic_notification|cpsc_section_15b|saferproducts_gov|reach_registration — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  supporting_document_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents, attachments, or exhibits included with the submission (e.g., safety data sheets, clinical studies, ingredient declarations).']
  target_decision_date date [note: 'Expected or target date by which the regulatory authority is anticipated to issue a decision on the submission.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the submission, incremented when amendments or resubmissions are filed.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who created the submission record in the regulatory management system.']

  Note: 'Regulatory submission records filed with any governing body worldwide. Captures submission type (510k, PMA, GRAS, TSCA, cosmetic notification, CPSC Section 15(b) report, SaferProducts.gov, REACH registration), submission date, dossier reference, submission channel, assigned reviewer, status, target decision date, hazard/incident details (for safety filings), population at risk, and linked registration. SSOT for all regulatory filings regardless of authority. Sourced from Veeva Vault regulatory submissions module.'
}

Table regulatory.dossier {
  dossier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory dossier record. Primary key.']
  primary_contact_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Dossier primary contact is an employee responsible for dossier management; needed for responsibility reporting.']
  product_lca_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.product_lca. Business justification: Regulatory dossiers often require Life‑Cycle Assessment data; FK attaches the LCA record to the dossier.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product for which this regulatory dossier was compiled. Links to the product master record.']
  submission_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory submission that this dossier supports. One dossier may support multiple submissions across jurisdictions.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the dossier was formally approved by the regulatory affairs leadership or quality assurance team for submission or archival.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the regulatory affairs manager or quality assurance officer who approved the dossier for submission.']
  cfr_reference varchar [note: 'Specific CFR title and part number(s) that govern the regulatory requirements addressed by this dossier, applicable for U.S. FDA and EPA submissions.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, special instructions, or contextual information related to the dossier compilation, review, or submission.']
  compilation_date date [note: 'Date when the dossier compilation was completed and finalized for submission or review.']
  completeness_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric representation of dossier completeness, calculated as the percentage of required sections and documents that have been compiled and approved.']
  completeness_status varchar [note: 'Assessment of whether all required documentation sections and supporting materials have been compiled and verified for regulatory submission readiness.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level indicating the sensitivity and access restrictions for the dossier content.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the dossier record was first created in the regulatory data management system.']
  document_count varchar [note: 'Total number of individual documents included in this regulatory dossier package.']
  dossier_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the regulatory dossier, used for external reference and tracking across regulatory affairs teams and submissions.']
  dossier_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory dossier indicating its stage in the compilation and submission process.']
  dossier_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the regulatory dossier format and submission standard. CTD (Common Technical Document), eCTD (Electronic Common Technical Document), IECIC (International Cooperation on Cosmetics Regulation), CPNP (Cosmetic Products Notification Portal), FDA 510K (Medical Device Premarket Notification), EPA FIFRA (Federal Insecticide Fungicide and Rodenticide Act).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the dossier becomes the active regulatory documentation package for the associated product or submission.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the dossier is no longer valid or requires renewal, typically driven by regulatory authority requirements or internal policy.']
  gmp_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the dossier includes documentation demonstrating compliance with Good Manufacturing Practice standards as required by regulatory authorities.']
  ifra_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the dossier includes documentation demonstrating compliance with IFRA standards for fragrance ingredients.']
  ingredient_declaration_included boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether a complete ingredient declaration (INCI list or equivalent) is included in the dossier.']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country or region code representing the regulatory jurisdiction for which this dossier applies.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 language code (with optional ISO 3166-1 country code) indicating the primary language in which the dossier documentation is compiled.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update or modification to the dossier record, supporting audit trail and version control.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent periodic review or audit of the dossier content for accuracy, completeness, and regulatory compliance.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review or update of the dossier, ensuring ongoing compliance with evolving regulatory requirements.']
  owning_team varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the regulatory affairs team responsible for compiling, maintaining, and submitting this dossier.']
  post_market_surveillance_included boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether post-market surveillance data, adverse event reports, or vigilance documentation is included in the dossier.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'REACH registration number for chemical substances included in the dossier, required for EU market compliance.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory body or agency for which this dossier is intended. FDA (U.S. Food and Drug Administration), EPA (Environmental Protection Agency), CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission), EMA (European Medicines Agency), MHRA (Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency), ANVISA (Brazilian Health Regulatory Agency), PMDA (Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency Japan). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EPA|CPSC|EMA|MHRA|ANVISA|PMDA — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_category varchar [note: 'Broad regulatory classification of the dossier content, such as cosmetics, personal care, household products, food contact materials, or pesticides, aligning with applicable regulatory frameworks. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cosmetics|personal_care|household_cleaning|food_contact|pesticides|biocides|medical_devices — promote to reference product]']
  safety_assessment_included boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether a formal safety assessment report is included in the dossier, as required for cosmetic and personal care product registrations.']
  sds_included boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether Safety Data Sheets (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are included in the dossier for hazardous substances or mixtures.']
  vault_folder_path varchar [note: 'Hierarchical folder path within Veeva Vault where the dossier documents are stored, enabling navigation and retrieval.']
  vault_reference_code varchar [note: 'External reference identifier linking this dossier record to the corresponding document repository location in Veeva Vault for full document access and version control.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the dossier, tracking revisions and updates to the compiled documentation package.']

  Note: 'Regulatory dossier master record representing the compiled technical and scientific documentation package supporting a product registration or submission. Tracks dossier type (CTD, eCTD, IECIC, CPNP), version, compilation date, owning regulatory affairs team, completeness status, linked submission, and document repository reference in Veeva Vault. One dossier may support multiple submissions across jurisdictions.'
}

Table regulatory.sds {
  sds_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the Safety Data Sheet record. Primary key.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the raw material, finished good, or intermediate product that this SDS describes.']
  accidental_release_measures varchar [note: 'Personal precautions, protective equipment, emergency procedures, and methods for containment and cleanup of spills or releases.']
  appearance varchar [note: 'Visual description of the substance including color and form.']
  authoring_chemist varchar [note: 'Name of the qualified chemist or toxicologist who authored or reviewed this SDS for technical accuracy.']
  autoignition_temperature varchar [note: 'Temperature at which the substance will spontaneously ignite without an external ignition source.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'CAS Registry Number uniquely identifying the chemical substance or mixture, if applicable.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating the jurisdiction for which this SDS is prepared (e.g., USA, GBR, DEU).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this SDS record was first created in the system.']
  disposal_considerations varchar [note: 'Guidance on proper disposal methods, waste treatment, and applicable regulations for the substance and contaminated packaging.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the safety document type: SDS (Safety Data Sheet per GHS), MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheet legacy format), or Extended SDS (with additional exposure scenarios).']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Uniform Resource Locator (URL) or file path to the published SDS document in the document management system.']
  ecological_information varchar [note: 'Environmental impact data including aquatic toxicity, persistence and degradability, bioaccumulative potential, and mobility in soil.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this SDS version becomes the official document for regulatory and operational use.']
  emergency_phone_number varchar [note: '24-hour emergency contact telephone number for chemical emergency response (e.g., CHEMTREC, poison control).']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when this SDS version is superseded or no longer valid, requiring update or renewal.']
  exposure_limits varchar [note: 'Occupational exposure limits (OELs), permissible exposure limits (PELs), threshold limit values (TLVs), and biological exposure indices.']
  firefighting_measures varchar [note: 'Suitable extinguishing media, unsuitable extinguishing media, and special hazards arising from the substance or mixture during fire.']
  first_aid_measures varchar [note: 'Detailed first aid instructions for different exposure routes (inhalation, skin contact, eye contact, ingestion) as required by GHS Section 4.']
  flash_point varchar [note: 'Lowest temperature at which vapors of the substance will ignite when given an ignition source, typically in degrees Celsius.']
  ghs_classification varchar [note: 'GHS hazard classification codes assigned to this substance or mixture (e.g., Flam. Liq. 2, Acute Tox. 3, Skin Corr. 1B).']
  handling_precautions varchar [note: 'Safe handling practices and precautions for use to prevent exposure and ensure worker safety.']
  hazard_statements varchar [note: 'Standardized GHS hazard statements (H-codes) describing the nature and degree of hazards (e.g., H225: Highly flammable liquid and vapor).']
  hazardous_decomposition_products varchar [note: 'Hazardous substances that may be formed under fire conditions or other decomposition scenarios.']
  incompatible_materials varchar [note: 'Materials or substances that should not be stored or used with this product due to potential hazardous reactions.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date when this SDS was originally issued or first published.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code indicating the language in which this SDS is written (e.g., EN for English, ES for Spanish).']
  manufacturer_address varchar [note: 'Complete physical address of the manufacturer or supplier for regulatory contact purposes.']
  manufacturer_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the company that manufactures or supplies the product covered by this SDS.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this SDS record was last modified or updated in the system.']
  odor varchar [note: 'Characteristic odor of the substance or mixture, if detectable.']
  packing_group varchar [note: 'UN packing group indicating degree of danger for transport: I (high danger), II (medium danger), III (low danger).']
  personal_protective_equipment varchar [note: 'Required personal protective equipment for safe handling: respiratory protection, hand protection, eye protection, skin protection.']
  ph_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'pH measurement of the substance or mixture, indicating acidity or alkalinity.']
  physical_state varchar [note: 'Physical form of the substance or mixture at ambient conditions.']
  pictograms varchar [note: 'List of GHS pictogram codes required on the label (e.g., GHS02 Flame, GHS07 Exclamation Mark, GHS08 Health Hazard).']
  precautionary_statements varchar [note: 'Standardized GHS precautionary statements (P-codes) describing recommended measures to minimize or prevent adverse effects (e.g., P210: Keep away from heat/sparks/open flames).']
  product_code varchar [note: 'Internal product code or SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) for the material covered by this SDS.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'The commercial or chemical name of the product or substance covered by this SDS.']
  proper_shipping_name varchar [note: 'Official shipping name for transport documentation as specified by UN/DOT regulations.']
  regulatory_information varchar [note: 'Applicable regulatory requirements including TSCA status, REACH registration, California Prop 65, SARA Title III, and other jurisdiction-specific regulations.']
  revision_date date [note: 'Date when this version of the SDS was last revised or updated.']
  sds_number varchar [note: 'The externally-known unique document number assigned to this SDS, used for regulatory submissions and cross-referencing.']
  sds_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the SDS document within the regulatory document management system.']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'GHS signal word indicating the severity level of the hazard: Danger (more severe) or Warning (less severe).']
  stability varchar [note: 'Chemical stability information and conditions to avoid that may cause instability or hazardous reactions.']
  storage_conditions varchar [note: 'Conditions for safe storage including temperature, humidity, ventilation requirements, and incompatible materials.']
  toxicological_information varchar [note: 'Comprehensive toxicology data including acute toxicity, skin corrosion/irritation, eye damage/irritation, sensitization, mutagenicity, carcinogenicity, reproductive toxicity, and target organ effects.']
  transport_hazard_class varchar [note: 'UN/DOT hazard class for transportation (e.g., Class 3 Flammable Liquids, Class 8 Corrosives).']
  un_number varchar [note: 'Four-digit UN identification number for hazardous materials transport classification.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for this SDS revision, tracking document evolution over time.']

  Note: 'Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS) master records for raw materials, finished goods, and intermediates as required by OSHA HazCom, EU CLP, and GHS standards. Captures SDS version, revision date, GHS hazard classifications, signal word, precautionary statements, first aid measures, handling/storage requirements, disposal guidance, transport classification (UN number, packing group), and authoring chemist. Managed in Veeva Vault.'
}

Table regulatory.ingredient_list {
  ingredient_list_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for ingredient_list']
  product_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the formulation record that defines the recipe and composition for this product. Links to formulation master data.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the finished product SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) for which this ingredient declaration applies. Links to product master data.']
  allergen_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is a known allergen requiring special labeling or disclosure per regulatory requirements (e.g., EU Cosmetics Regulation Annex III).']
  allergen_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the allergen type if allergen_flag is true. Used for consumer safety labeling and regulatory compliance.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the regulatory affairs professional who approved this ingredient declaration for use.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this ingredient declaration was approved by regulatory affairs.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service) registry number identifying the chemical substance. Used for regulatory submissions and safety documentation.']
  common_name varchar [note: 'Common or trade name of the ingredient used for internal reference and non-regulated communications.']
  concentration_max_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for regulatory submissions and formulation specifications.']
  concentration_min_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for regulatory submissions and formulation specifications.']
  concentration_typical_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Typical or target concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for quality control and manufacturing guidance.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this ingredient declaration record was first created in the data platform.']
  declaration_name_override varchar [note: 'Alternative name to be used on the product label if different from INCI name, as permitted by jurisdiction-specific regulations (e.g., trade name, common name).']
  declaration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient must be declared on the product label per regulatory requirements. Some processing aids or trace contaminants may be exempt.']
  declaration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ingredient declaration record in the regulatory documentation workflow.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this ingredient declaration becomes effective for regulatory compliance and labeling purposes.']
  einecs_number varchar [note: 'EINECS (European Inventory of Existing Commercial Chemical Substances) number for substances marketed in the EU before September 1981. Required for EU REACH compliance.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which this ingredient declaration is no longer valid, typically due to formulation changes or regulatory updates. Null indicates no expiration.']
  fda_status varchar [note: 'FDA (Food and Drug Administration) regulatory status of the ingredient for use in consumer goods (e.g., GRAS - Generally Recognized As Safe, approved food additive, approved color additive).']
  ifra_amendment_number varchar [note: 'IFRA (International Fragrance Association) amendment number that governs the use restrictions for this ingredient if IFRA restricted.']
  ifra_restricted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is subject to IFRA (International Fragrance Association) restrictions or standards for use in fragrance compounds.']
  inci_name varchar [note: 'Standardized INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients) name for the ingredient as required for cosmetic product labeling. Mandatory for cosmetics and personal care products.']
  ingredient_function varchar [note: 'Primary functional role of the ingredient in the formulation (e.g., preservative, surfactant, fragrance, colorant, active ingredient). Used for regulatory classification and formulation analysis. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: preservative|surfactant|emollient|humectant|emulsifier|thickener|fragrance|colorant|active_ingredient|solvent|ph_adjuster|antioxidant|chelating_agent|opacifier|film_former — 15 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  ingredient_sequence varchar [note: 'Order in which this ingredient appears on the product label declaration. Typically sorted by descending concentration per regulatory requirements (FDA 21 CFR, EU Cosmetics Regulation).']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory jurisdiction for which this ingredient declaration record applies. Uses ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USA|CAN|MEX|GBR|DEU|FRA|ITA|ESP|CHN|JPN|AUS|BRA|IND|KOR — 14 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this ingredient declaration record was last modified in the data platform.']
  nanomaterial_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is in nanomaterial form, requiring special labeling per EU Cosmetics Regulation (nano) designation.']
  natural_origin_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is derived from natural sources (plant, mineral, animal) as opposed to synthetic or petrochemical sources. Used for natural product claims and marketing.']
  organic_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is certified organic by a recognized certification body (e.g., USDA Organic, COSMOS, ECOCERT). Used for organic product claims.']
  palm_oil_derivative_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is derived from palm oil. Used for sustainable sourcing tracking and RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil) compliance.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'REACH (Registration Evaluation Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals) registration number for substances manufactured or imported in the EU in quantities of 1 tonne or more per year.']
  restricted_substance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is subject to regulatory restrictions, concentration limits, or prohibited use conditions in certain jurisdictions.']
  restriction_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of jurisdictions or regulatory bodies where restrictions apply (e.g., EU, USA, CAN, JPN). Used for multi-jurisdictional compliance management.']
  restriction_type varchar [note: 'Type of regulatory restriction applied to this ingredient if restricted_substance_flag is true. Defines the nature of the regulatory control.']
  rspo_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether palm-derived ingredients are RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil) certified for sustainable sourcing.']
  sds_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number linking this ingredient to its Safety Data Sheet (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) document for hazard communication and workplace safety.']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of this record in the source system, used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Identifier of the source system from which this ingredient declaration record originated (e.g., Veeva Vault, SAP PLM, internal formulation system).']
  vegan_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is free from animal-derived substances and suitable for vegan product claims.']

  Note: 'Ingredient declaration records capturing the full ingredient list for a finished product SKU as required for labeling compliance. Tracks INCI names, CAS numbers, concentration ranges, function (preservative, surfactant, fragrance, colorant), declaration order, jurisdiction-specific requirements (FDA 21 CFR, EU Cosmetics Regulation, REACH), allergen flags, and restricted substance flags. Links to product master and formulation records.'
}

Table regulatory.label_version {
  label_version_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the label version record. Primary key.']
  approval_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Label approvals are signed off by a regulatory employee; FK records who approved each label version.']
  previous_version_label_version_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the immediately preceding label version that this version supersedes, enabling version lineage tracking.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product SKU this label version applies to.']
  allergen_declarations varchar [note: 'Allergen declarations required on the label (e.g., \'Contains: milk, soy, tree nuts\'). Applicable for food and cosmetic products.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the label version received regulatory approval from the governing authority.']
  approval_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory approval expires and the label version can no longer be used, if applicable.']
  approval_reference_number varchar [note: 'Official reference or registration number assigned by the regulatory authority for this label approval.']
  approving_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory body or authority that approved this label version (e.g., FDA, EPA, EU Commission, Health Canada).']
  artwork_checksum varchar [note: 'SHA-256 checksum hash of the artwork file to ensure file integrity and detect unauthorized modifications.']
  artwork_file_name varchar [note: 'File name of the approved label artwork file (e.g., PDF, AI, or other format) stored in the document management system.']
  barcode_type varchar [note: 'Type of barcode symbology printed on the label (e.g., UPC, EAN-13, GTIN-14, QR Code, DataMatrix).']
  barcode_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The encoded value of the barcode printed on this label version (e.g., UPC number, GTIN, serialized data).']
  brand_name varchar [note: 'Brand name displayed on the label.']
  certification_marks varchar [note: 'Third-party certification marks and compliance logos displayed on the label (e.g., \'USDA Organic\', \'Leaping Bunny\', \'Non-GMO Project\', \'Kosher\', \'Halal\').']
  change_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason for creating this new label version (e.g., \'Regulatory requirement change\', \'Ingredient reformulation\', \'Packaging redesign\', \'Correction of error\').']
  contact_information varchar [note: 'Consumer contact information displayed on the label (phone number, website, email) for inquiries and customer service.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating where the product was manufactured or produced, as declared on the label.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this label version record was first created in the system.']
  distributor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the distributor or importer as declared on the label, if different from manufacturer.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this label version is no longer valid for new production. Nullable for currently active versions.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which this label version becomes effective and can be used in production and distribution.']
  expiry_date_format varchar [note: 'Format specification for how the expiry or best-before date will be printed on the label (e.g., \'MM/YYYY\', \'DD-MMM-YYYY\', \'EXP: YYYY-MM-DD\').']
  ingredient_list varchar [note: 'Full ingredient list as declared on the label in descending order of predominance, following regulatory naming conventions (INCI for cosmetics, common names for food).']
  is_current_version boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this is the currently active label version for the SKU in the specified market. True if current, False if historical.']
  label_claims varchar [note: 'Marketing claims and statements appearing on the label (e.g., \'organic\', \'hypoallergenic\', \'dermatologist tested\', \'cruelty-free\'). Pipe-separated list if multiple.']
  label_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the label type: primary (consumer-facing package), secondary (outer carton), shipper (distribution box), pallet (logistics unit), promotional (limited edition), or sample (trial size).']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code, optionally with ISO 3166-1 country code (e.g., en, en-US, fr-CA) indicating the label language.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who last modified this label version record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this label version record was last modified.']
  lot_code_format varchar [note: 'Format specification for the lot or batch code that will be printed on labels during production (e.g., \'YYMMDD-LLLL\' where LLLL is line code).']
  manufacturer_address varchar [note: 'Full address of the manufacturer as declared on the label for regulatory compliance and consumer contact.']
  manufacturer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the manufacturer as declared on the label for regulatory compliance.']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code identifying the market jurisdiction for this label version (e.g., USA, DEU, JPN).']
  net_content_declaration varchar [note: 'Full net content declaration statement as it appears on the label, including quantity and unit (e.g., \'500 ml\', \'16 fl oz (473 ml)\').']
  net_content_quantity decimal(18,6) [note: 'Numeric value of the net content quantity declared on the label.']
  net_content_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the net content quantity (e.g., ml, g, oz, fl_oz, count). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ml|l|g|kg|oz|lb|fl_oz|gal|count|each — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  product_name_on_label varchar [note: 'The exact product name as it appears on the label artwork, which may differ from internal product names due to marketing or regulatory requirements.']
  recycling_symbols varchar [note: 'Recycling symbols and sustainability marks displayed on the label (e.g., \'Recyclable\', \'FSC Certified\', \'Green Dot\', resin identification codes).']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current regulatory approval status of the label version in the target market jurisdiction. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|rejected|withdrawn|expired — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  veeva_vault_document_code varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to the label artwork document stored in Veeva Vault regulatory document management system.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Semantic version number of the label artwork (e.g., 1.0, 2.1, 3.0.1). Follows semantic versioning convention.']
  warning_statements varchar [note: 'Mandatory warning and precautionary statements required by regulatory authorities (e.g., \'Keep out of reach of children\', \'For external use only\').']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who created this label version record.']

  Note: 'Product label version master tracking all approved and historical label artwork versions for each SKU across markets. Captures label version number, market/country, language, label type (primary, secondary, shipper), regulatory approval status, approval date, approving authority, label claims, warning statements, net content declaration, country-of-origin, and Veeva Vault document reference. Supports multi-jurisdictional labeling compliance.'
}

Table regulatory.compliance_obligation {
  compliance_obligation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance obligation record. Primary key.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Compliance budgeting assigns each obligation to a cost center for internal charge‑back and reporting.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Expense for a compliance obligation is posted to a specific GL account for financial statements.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Compliance obligations are defined per regulatory jurisdiction; linking provides a normalized reference and removes duplicated jurisdiction fields.']
  responsible_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Each compliance obligation is owned by a specific employee; linking enables ownership tracking and audit.']
  advance_notice_period_days varchar [note: 'The number of days in advance that the business must be notified or begin preparation to meet this compliance obligation.']
  applicable_product_category varchar [note: 'The product category or categories to which this compliance obligation applies (e.g., cosmetics, household cleaners, personal care, food contact materials).']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'The date by which the compliance obligation must be fulfilled to avoid regulatory penalties or non-compliance.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or context regarding this compliance obligation, including special instructions, historical context, or exceptions.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of compliance with this obligation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this compliance obligation record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the estimated compliance cost (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date when this compliance obligation becomes effective and enforceable.']
  estimated_compliance_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'The estimated financial cost to fulfill this compliance obligation, including registration fees, testing costs, documentation, and labor.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date when this compliance obligation expires or is no longer applicable, if applicable.']
  governing_body varchar [note: 'The regulatory authority or governing body that enforces this obligation (e.g., FDA, EPA, CPSC, EU Commission).']
  governing_regulation varchar [note: 'The specific regulation, directive, or legal framework that mandates this obligation (e.g., CFR 21 Part 701, EU Directive 2009/48/EC, REACH Article 33).']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this compliance obligation is currently active and applicable to the business.']
  last_compliance_verification_date date [note: 'The date when compliance with this obligation was last verified or audited.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this compliance obligation record was last updated or modified.']
  next_audit_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next internal or external audit of compliance with this obligation.']
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'The date when the next renewal or re-certification of this obligation is due.']
  notification_sent_date date [note: 'The date when the compliance deadline notification was sent to the responsible owner.']
  notification_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether advance notification has been sent to the responsible owner regarding the upcoming compliance deadline.']
  obligation_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the compliance obligation, used for external reference and reporting.']
  obligation_name varchar [note: 'Full descriptive name of the compliance obligation.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the compliance obligation by regulatory action required.']
  penalty_for_non_compliance varchar [note: 'Description of the penalties, fines, or consequences for failing to meet this compliance obligation (e.g., product recall, market withdrawal, monetary fines, legal action).']
  priority varchar [note: 'The business priority assigned to fulfilling this compliance obligation, used for resource allocation and scheduling.']
  renewal_frequency varchar [note: 'The frequency at which this compliance obligation must be renewed or re-certified.']
  required_documentation varchar [note: 'List or description of the documentation required to fulfill this compliance obligation (e.g., Safety Data Sheet (SDS), ingredient declaration, test reports, certificates of analysis).']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'The department or business unit responsible for managing this compliance obligation (e.g., Regulatory Affairs, Quality Assurance, Legal).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'The assessed risk level associated with non-compliance with this obligation, based on potential business impact, regulatory scrutiny, and penalty severity.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The operational system of record from which this compliance obligation data originates (e.g., Veeva Vault, SAP ERP, internal regulatory database).']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this compliance obligation in the source system of record.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'The method by which compliance documentation or filings must be submitted to the governing body.']
  submission_portal_url varchar [note: 'The web address of the electronic portal or system where compliance submissions must be filed, if applicable.']
  testing_requirement varchar [note: 'Description of any laboratory testing or analytical work required to demonstrate compliance (e.g., stability testing, microbial testing, heavy metals analysis, allergen testing).']

  Note: 'Master record of regulatory compliance obligations applicable to the business by jurisdiction, product category, and governing body. Tracks obligation type (registration, labeling, reporting, testing, notification, renewal), governing regulation (CFR part, EU directive, REACH article, state law), applicable product categories, compliance deadline, renewal frequency, advance notice period, responsible regulatory affairs owner, estimated compliance cost, and current compliance status. Drives the regulatory compliance calendar and proactive renewal management.'
}

Table regulatory.compliance_assessment {
  compliance_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for compliance_assessment']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Assessment work generates expenses that must be posted to a GL account for financial reporting.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing or distribution facility being assessed for regulatory compliance.']
  primary_compliance_assessor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier for the individual who conducted the compliance assessment.']
  product_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific product formulation undergoing compliance assessment.']
  reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier for the individual who reviewed and approved the compliance assessment.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product being assessed for regulatory compliance.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'The date on which the compliance assessment was performed.']
  assessment_method varchar [note: 'Method or approach used to conduct the compliance assessment (e.g., document review, laboratory test, site inspection, supplier audit, self-assessment, third-party certification).']
  assessment_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique identifier for the compliance assessment record, typically formatted as CA-YYYYNNNN.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the compliance assessment type (e.g., initial, periodic, pre-market, post-market, audit-triggered, change control).']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual or team who conducted the compliance assessment.']
  audit_trail_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking this compliance assessment to the audit trail or change history log for traceability and regulatory audit readiness.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the third-party certification or approval certificate obtained as evidence of compliance, if applicable.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date on which the compliance assessment was formally closed after verification of corrective actions or confirmation of compliance.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional comments, notes, or observations related to the compliance assessment that provide context or clarification.']
  compliance_finding varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the compliance assessment finding, including observations, test results, and rationale for the compliance determination.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance finding status indicating whether the product, formulation, or facility meets the regulatory requirement (compliant, non-compliant, conditional, pending review, not applicable).']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the corrective action plan required to remediate the non-compliance or conditional finding.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Target date by which the corrective action must be completed to achieve compliance.']
  corrective_action_owner varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or department responsible for implementing the corrective action.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether corrective action is required to address the compliance finding (True if corrective action is required, False otherwise).']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the corrective action implementation (not started, in progress, completed, verified, overdue).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when the compliance assessment record was first created in the system.']
  evidence_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URI to the supporting documentation, test reports, certificates, or dossiers that substantiate the compliance assessment finding.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the regulatory jurisdiction under which the compliance assessment applies (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR, CHN).']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when the compliance assessment record was last modified or updated.']
  next_assessment_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic compliance assessment or re-assessment.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or governing body responsible for the regulatory framework (e.g., FDA, EPA, ECHA, CPSC).']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'The governing regulatory framework under which the compliance assessment is conducted (e.g., CFR, IFRA, EU CLP, REACH, EPA, FDA, CPSC). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CFR|IFRA|EU_CLP|REACH|EPA|FDA|CPSC — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  requirement_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the specific regulatory requirement being assessed for compliance.']
  requirement_reference varchar [note: 'Specific citation or reference to the regulatory requirement being assessed (e.g., 21 CFR 701.3, IFRA Standard 49, REACH Annex XVII Entry 23).']
  review_date date [note: 'Date on which the compliance assessment was formally reviewed and approved.']
  reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual who reviewed and approved the compliance assessment findings.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk severity level associated with the compliance finding (critical, high, medium, low, negligible).']
  test_report_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the laboratory test report or analytical certificate supporting the compliance assessment, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Transactional records documenting compliance assessments against specific regulatory requirements (CFR, IFRA, EU CLP, REACH, state regulations) for each product, formulation, or facility. Captures regulatory framework, specific requirement reference, compliance assessment date, assessor, compliance finding (compliant, non-compliant, conditional), corrective action required, corrective action due date, closure date, and evidence document reference. Supports multi-framework compliance verification including FDA/EPA audit readiness and IFRA fragrance safety substantiation. SSOT for all regulatory compliance assessments regardless of governing body.'
}

Table regulatory.reach_substance {
  reach_substance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the REACH substance record. Primary key.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Reach substances are regulated per jurisdiction; linking normalizes jurisdiction data and eliminates the duplicated code column.']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this substance record is currently active and in use within the organization\'s product portfolio.']
  authorization_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the granted authorization expires and the substance can no longer be used unless renewed.']
  authorization_number varchar [note: 'Unique authorization number granted by the European Commission for use of an Annex XIV substance.']
  authorization_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is subject to authorization requirements under REACH Annex XIV before it can be placed on the market or used.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique numerical identifier assigned by the Chemical Abstracts Service to every chemical substance described in the open scientific literature.']
  cmr_classification varchar [note: 'Classification indicating whether the substance is carcinogenic, mutagenic, or toxic for reproduction, and its category level. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: carcinogenic|mutagenic|reprotoxic|cmr_category_1a|cmr_category_1b|cmr_category_2|not_cmr — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this REACH substance record was first created in the system.']
  dnel_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the DNEL value.']
  dnel_value decimal(18,6) [note: 'The level of exposure to the substance above which humans should not be exposed, expressed in mg/kg body weight/day or mg/m³.']
  downstream_user_notification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether downstream users must be notified of specific obligations or restrictions related to this substance.']
  ec_number varchar [note: 'Seven-digit identifier assigned to chemical substances commercially available in the European Union between 1971 and 1981 (EINECS) or notified under Directive 67/548/EEC (ELINCS).']
  endocrine_disruptor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is identified as an endocrine disruptor under EU criteria.']
  exposure_scenario_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether exposure scenarios must be developed and communicated in the extended Safety Data Sheet for this substance.']
  ghs_pictogram_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of GHS pictogram codes required on labels (e.g., GHS02, GHS05, GHS07, GHS09).']
  h_statements varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized hazard statement codes describing the nature of hazards (e.g., H302, H315, H400).']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Classification and Labelling (CLP) hazard class and category codes assigned to the substance (e.g., Acute Tox. 3, Skin Corr. 1B, Aquatic Chronic 2).']
  last_evaluation_date date [note: 'Date when the substance was last evaluated by ECHA or competent authorities for compliance or risk assessment purposes.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this REACH substance record was last updated or modified.']
  market_access_status_eu varchar [note: 'Current market access status for placing the substance on the EU market.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review or re-evaluation of the substance registration or authorization.']
  p_statements varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized precautionary statement codes describing recommended measures to minimize or prevent adverse effects (e.g., P264, P280, P301+P312).']
  pbt_assessment varchar [note: 'Assessment result indicating whether the substance meets the criteria for being Persistent, Bioaccumulative and Toxic (PBT) or very Persistent and very Bioaccumulative (vPvB).']
  pnec_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the PNEC value.']
  pnec_value decimal(18,6) [note: 'The concentration of the substance below which adverse effects in the environmental sphere of concern are not expected to occur.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'Unique registration number issued by ECHA upon successful REACH registration. Format: YY-XXXXXXXXXX-XX-XXXX where YY is submission year.']
  registration_date date [note: 'Date when the substance was successfully registered with ECHA under REACH.']
  registration_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the current REACH registration expires and renewal is required.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the substance registration under REACH regulation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: registered|pre-registered|inquiry|exempted|not_required|pending|withdrawn — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  restriction_conditions varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the specific conditions, limitations, or prohibitions applied to the substance under REACH Annex XVII restrictions.']
  restriction_entry_number varchar [note: 'The entry number in REACH Annex XVII that specifies the restriction applicable to this substance.']
  restriction_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is subject to restrictions under REACH Annex XVII limiting or prohibiting its manufacture, use, or placing on the market.']
  sds_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a Safety Data Sheet must be provided for this substance under REACH Article 31.']
  sds_revision_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent revision of the Safety Data Sheet.']
  sds_version varchar [note: 'Current version number of the Safety Data Sheet for this substance.']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'GHS signal word indicating the relative level of severity of hazard: Danger (more severe) or Warning (less severe).']
  substance_name varchar [note: 'The common or chemical name of the substance as registered under REACH.']
  substance_origin_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating the primary country of origin or manufacture for this substance.']
  supplier_reference_number varchar [note: 'Internal reference number or code used by the supplier to identify this substance in their catalog or system.']
  svhc_inclusion_date date [note: 'Date when the substance was added to the SVHC Candidate List by ECHA.']
  svhc_status varchar [note: 'Classification status indicating whether the substance is identified as a Substance of Very High Concern under REACH Article 57, requiring special authorization or restriction.']
  tonnage_band varchar [note: 'Annual quantity band (in metric tonnes per year) of the substance manufactured or imported into the EU, determining registration requirements and data submission obligations.']
  use_descriptor_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized use descriptor codes (SU, PC, PROC, ERC, AC) describing identified uses of the substance.']

  Note: 'EU REACH regulation substance master tracking all chemical substances used in products or processes that are subject to REACH registration, evaluation, authorization, or restriction. Captures SVHC (Substance of Very High Concern) status, REACH registration number, EC number, CAS number, tonnage band, authorization status, restriction conditions, SDS requirement flag, and downstream user notification obligations. Critical for EU market access.'
}

Table regulatory.ifra_compliance_record {
  ifra_compliance_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the IFRA compliance record. Primary key for tracking fragrance ingredient compliance assessments against IFRA standards.']
  assessor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the assessor who performed the IFRA compliance evaluation. Links to HR system for audit trail.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product containing the fragrance ingredient. Links to the product master data for which this IFRA compliance assessment applies.']
  actual_formulated_usage_level decimal(10,6) [note: 'Actual concentration of the fragrance ingredient in the finished product formulation. Expressed in the same unit as maximum_permitted_usage_level. Used to determine compliance status.']
  allergen_declaration_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fragrance ingredient is a recognized allergen requiring declaration on product labeling per EU Cosmetics Regulation or other jurisdictional requirements.']
  allergen_threshold_exceeded boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fragrance ingredient concentration exceeds the allergen labeling threshold (0.001% for leave-on, 0.01% for rinse-off products per EU regulation).']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the IFRA compliance record was formally approved by regulatory affairs. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Workflow approval status of the IFRA compliance record. Approved records are used for regulatory submissions and product release decisions.']
