Supports GRI 400-series reporting, SASB social metrics, and B Corp assessment.'
}

Table sustainability.deforestation_assessment {
  deforestation_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each deforestation risk assessment record.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Deforestation assessments support ESG commitments on forest risk; linking provides commitment‑level tracking.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier or sourcing entity being assessed.']
  assessment_approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the assessment was formally approved.']
  assessment_approved_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who approved the assessment.']
  assessment_code varchar [note: 'External reference code assigned to the assessment for tracking across systems.']
  assessment_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the assessment record.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date on which the deforestation risk assessment was performed.']
  assessment_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments captured by the assessor.']
  assessment_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent review of the assessment findings.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the assessment.']
  carbon_emission_estimate_tonnes decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions (tonnes) linked to the commodity\'s production.']
  certification_coverage_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of the supply chain covered by recognized sustainability certifications.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Sustainability certification held by the supplier (e.g., FSC, RSPO).']
  certification_valid_until date [note: 'Expiration date of the supplier\'s sustainability certification.']
  commodity_type varchar [note: 'Category of the high‑risk commodity evaluated for deforestation risk.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Overall quality rating of the assessment data.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the assessment data.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(10,2) [note: 'Energy consumed (megawatt‑hours) for the commodity\'s processing.']
  eudr_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Compliance status with the EU Deforestation Regulation.']
  eudr_regulation_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the specific EU Deforestation Regulation clause applicable.']
  forest_area_ha decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total forest area (in hectares) associated with the sourcing region.']
  forest_cover_change_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percent change in forest cover observed in the sourcing area over the assessment period.']
  methodology varchar [note: 'Analytical methodology applied to evaluate deforestation risk.']
  remediation_action_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the remediation steps to be taken.']
  remediation_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether corrective remediation actions are required based on the assessment outcome.']
  risk_assessment_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the detailed assessment report or supporting documentation.']
  risk_assessment_methodology_version varchar [note: 'Version of the risk assessment methodology used.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk score (0‑100) representing the likelihood of deforestation associated with the commodity.']
  risk_score_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement for the risk score, typically \'percentage\'.']
  sourcing_region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the region where the commodity originates.']
  traceability_level varchar [note: 'Depth of traceability achieved for the commodity (e.g., farm‑level, mill‑level).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the assessment record.']
  water_usage_m3 decimal(10,2) [note: 'Volume of water (cubic metres) consumed in the production of the assessed commodity.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of deforestation risk assessments conducted for high-risk commodities (palm oil, soy, paper/pulp, cattle-derived ingredients, cocoa) in the Consumer Goods supply chain. Captures assessment date, commodity type, supplier or sourcing region reference, risk methodology (Trase, Global Forest Watch, EUDR traceability), deforestation risk score, forest cover change data, certification coverage percentage, traceability level (farm, mill, trader), EUDR (EU Deforestation Regulation) compliance status, and remediation action required flag. Supports EUDR compliance and zero-deforestation commitments.'
}

Table sustainability.esg_audit {
  esg_audit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the ESG audit record.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link esg_audit to esg_commitment to connect audit outcomes with commitments.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the facility or site audited.']
  audit_certification_status varchar [note: 'Status of the related certification after the audit (e.g., maintained, revoked, pending).']
  audit_date date [note: 'Date on which the audit was performed (principal business event timestamp).']
  audit_duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total time spent on the audit, expressed in hours.']
  audit_findings_summary varchar [note: 'Narrative summary of key findings and observations.']
  audit_location varchar [note: 'City or locality where the audit was conducted.']
  audit_method varchar [note: 'Methodology used to conduct the audit.']
  audit_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or reference code assigned to the audit.']
  audit_region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the audit location.']
  audit_report_reference varchar [note: 'Document identifier for the final audit report.']
  audit_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of the audit (e.g., plant, process, product line).']
  audit_scope_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the audit scope.']
  audit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the audit.']
  audit_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the audit (e.g., ISO 14001 surveillance, ISO 22716 GMP, third‑party ESG, internal EMS).']
  auditing_body varchar [note: 'Organization or entity that performed the audit.']
  auditor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead auditor or audit team representative.']
  carbon_emission_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether carbon emission data were evaluated in the audit.']
  certification_impact_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether audit findings affect ISO certification renewal (true = impact).']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance determination after the audit.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Target date for completing corrective actions.']
  corrective_action_plan_ref varchar [note: 'Reference code or identifier for the corrective action plan linked to this audit.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the corrective action plan.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the audit record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Assessment of the quality and reliability of audit data.']
  energy_consumption_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether energy consumption aspects were covered.']
  findings_major varchar [note: 'Number of major non‑conformances identified.']
  findings_minor varchar [note: 'Number of minor non‑conformances identified.']
  findings_observation varchar [note: 'Number of observations (opportunities for improvement) recorded.']
  next_audit_date date [note: 'Planned date for the subsequent audit of the same scope.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations recorded by the auditor.']
  overall_result varchar [note: 'Overall outcome of the audit after evaluating findings.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority referenced in the audit (e.g., EPA, FDA).']
  reporting_quarter varchar [note: 'Quarter (1‑4) of the reporting year.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the audit results are reported.']
  risk_severity varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating derived from audit findings.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the audit record.']
  waste_management_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether waste management aspects were covered.']
  water_usage_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether water consumption aspects were covered.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of internal and external ESG audits and environmental management system audits conducted at Consumer Goods facilities. Captures audit date, audit type (ISO 14001 surveillance, ISO 22716 GMP environmental, third-party ESG audit, internal EMS audit), auditing body, facility or scope reference, audit findings count by severity (major nonconformance, minor nonconformance, observation), overall audit result, corrective action plan reference, next audit scheduled date, and certification renewal impact flag. Supports ISO 14001 certification maintenance and ESG assurance processes.'
}

Table sustainability.commitment_progress {
  commitment_progress_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for commitment_progress']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the ESG commitment to which this progress record relates.']
  actual_value decimal(20,4) [note: 'Observed value achieved for the ESG metric during the reporting period.']
  commentary varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes explaining variances, challenges, or observations for the period.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the progress record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the metric (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Cloud ERP, Siemens Opcenter MES, manual entry).']
  measurement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the actual metric value was recorded.']
  percentage_of_target decimal(5,2) [note: 'Actual value expressed as a percentage of the target value.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the reporting period.']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the reporting period.']
  period_type varchar [note: 'Granularity of the reporting period for the progress measurement.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the progress record.']
  reporting_boundary varchar [note: 'Geographic or organizational scope of the measurement (facility‑level, regional, or global).']
  target_value decimal(20,4) [note: 'Planned or committed value for the ESG metric for the reporting period.']
  trajectory_status varchar [note: 'Overall progress status indicating whether the commitment is on‑track, at‑risk, or off‑track for the period.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Standard unit in which the metric is expressed (e.g., kg CO₂e, cubic meters, kilowatt‑hours, percent).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the progress record.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the reported metric has been independently verified.']

  Note: 'Periodic operational record tracking actual progress against each ESG commitment target. Captures ESG commitment reference, reporting period (monthly, quarterly, annual), actual metric value achieved, unit of measure, target value for the period, percentage of target achieved, trajectory status (on-track, at-risk, off-track), data source system, reporting boundary (facility, region, global), and commentary on variances. Provides the time-series progress data layer that connects raw ESG metrics to formal commitment tracking and investor reporting.'
}

Table sustainability.biodiversity_impact {
  biodiversity_impact_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each biodiversity impact assessment record.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Biodiversity impacts are measured against ESG commitments; linking enables commitment‑centric biodiversity reporting.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the manufacturing or processing facility where the assessment took place.']
  region_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the geographic sourcing region associated with the assessment.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the assessment was formally approved.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual who approved the assessment outcome.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date on which the biodiversity impact assessment was performed.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the assessment record.']
  assessment_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the assessment methodology applied.']
  assessor_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the assessor for follow‑up or verification.']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the individual who performed the assessment.']
  biodiversity_impact_category varchar [note: 'Primary category describing the nature of the biodiversity impact.']
  biodiversity_score_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate the net biodiversity impact score.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the overall data quality for the record.']
  land_use_area_ha decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total area in hectares covered by the land use type within the assessment scope.']
  land_use_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the land use category for the area assessed. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: agriculture|forestry|mining|urban|wetland|grassland|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  mitigation_measures varchar [note: 'Narrative description of mitigation actions implemented to address the identified impact.']
  net_biodiversity_impact_score decimal(6,2) [note: 'Calculated score representing the overall net effect on biodiversity after mitigation, on a standardized scale.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the assessment.']
  proximity_to_protected_area_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Linear distance in kilometers from the facility or sourcing region to the nearest protected area or biodiversity hotspot.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'True if the assessment must be disclosed to regulatory bodies (e.g., FDA, EPA).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating enterprise system that supplied the assessment data.']
  tnfd_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the assessment is included in TNFD disclosures.']
  tnfd_risk_classification varchar [note: 'Risk level as defined by the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures (TNFD) framework.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the assessment record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing biodiversity impact assessments and nature-related risk data for Consumer Goods facilities and sourcing regions. Captures assessment date, facility or sourcing region reference, proximity to protected areas or biodiversity hotspots (km), land use type and area in hectares, biodiversity impact category (habitat loss, water stress, pollution, invasive species), TNFD (Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures) risk classification, mitigation measures in place, and net biodiversity impact score. Supports TNFD disclosure and nature-positive commitments.'
}

Table sustainability.supply_chain_activity {
  supply_chain_activity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for supply_chain_activity']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal or external party accountable for the activity.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link supply_chain_activity to esg_commitment to reflect commitment impact on supply chain activities.']
  network_node_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the location (warehouse, plant, distribution center) where the activity is performed.']
  upstream_supply_chain_activity_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on supply_chain_activity (upstream_supply_chain_activity_id)']
  activity_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification (e.g., Transportation, Production, Packaging, Waste Management).']
  activity_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code for the activity, used in ERP, TMS, or sustainability reporting systems.']
  activity_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the supply‑chain activity (e.g., "Transportation – Truck", "Packaging – Recyclable", "Manufacturing – Mixing").']
  activity_subcategory varchar [note: 'More detailed classification within the main category (e.g., "Truck – Long Haul", "Bottle – PET", "Landfill Disposal").']
  actual_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Observed metric for the activity in the latest reporting cycle.']
  baseline_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Historical or industry‑standard baseline figure for the activity, used for variance analysis.']
  carbon_footprint_kg decimal(12,4) [note: 'Quantity of greenhouse‑gas emissions attributable to the activity, expressed in kilograms of CO₂ equivalent.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the certification record.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Name of sustainability certification linked to the activity (e.g., FSC, RSPO, ISO 14001).']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the activity meets applicable ESG, ISO 14001, or other sustainability standards.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the activity definition was initially entered into the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date on which the activity definition starts to be valid for reporting.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date on which the activity definition is no longer valid; null if open‑ended.']
  energy_consumption_kwh decimal(12,4) [note: 'Electricity or fuel energy used by the activity, measured in kilowatt‑hours.']
  last_reported_timestamp timestamp [note: 'When the latest actual measurement for this activity was reported.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit used for the activity\'s quantitative metrics (e.g., kg, liters, kWh, km).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional remarks, observations, or exceptions related to the activity.']
  recycling_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of waste that is recycled, expressed as a percentage.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the activity data is collected and reported.']
  reporting_period varchar [note: 'Identifier for the fiscal or calendar period to which the data belongs.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system that supplied the activity data (e.g., TMS, ERP, IoT sensor platform).']
  status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the activity type is currently used, being phased out, or under review.']
  target_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Desired future value for the activity (e.g., target CO₂ emissions, water use) as part of ESG objectives.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the activity definition.']
  waste_generated_kg decimal(12,4) [note: 'Total waste produced as a result of the activity.']
  water_usage_liters decimal(12,4) [note: 'Volume of water consumed during the activity.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for supply_chain_activity. Referenced by supply_chain_activity_id.'
}

Table sustainability.materiality_assessment {
  materiality_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for materiality_assessment']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the person who reviewed and approved the assessment.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link materiality_assessment to esg_commitment to tie materiality results to commitments.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the department owning the assessment.']
  previous_materiality_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on materiality_assessment (previous_materiality_assessment_id)']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the assessment was formally approved.']
  assessment_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code used to reference the assessment.']
  assessment_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the materiality assessment.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the assessment based on its origin or purpose.']
  assessment_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the assessment was performed.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations recorded by the assessor.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the assessment record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quality rating of the data used for the assessment.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data used in the assessment (e.g., surveys, financial reports).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the assessment results are considered effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the assessment ceases to be valid (nullable for open‑ended assessments).']
  external_certification varchar [note: 'Relevant sustainability certifications associated with the assessment.']
  impact_category varchar [note: 'Expected impact level of the material issue on the business.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the assessment is currently active.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent review of the assessment.']
  last_updated_by varchar [note: 'User name or identifier of the person who performed the last update.']
  materiality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative score indicating the materiality level of the assessed issue.']
  methodology varchar [note: 'Description of the methodology and approach used to calculate materiality.']
  mitigation_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions to address the material issue.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Supplementary information or observations related to the assessment.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Prioritization for mitigation actions based on materiality.']
  rating varchar [note: 'Categorical rating derived from the materiality score.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Reporting framework or standard applied to the assessment.']
  reporting_cycle varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the assessment is performed and reported.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'High‑level ESG risk category to which the material issue belongs.']
  scope varchar [note: 'Geographic or operational scope covered by the assessment.']
  stakeholder_engagement_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score reflecting the level of stakeholder engagement in the assessment process.']
  stakeholder_group varchar [note: 'Primary stakeholder group(s) considered in the materiality analysis.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the assessment.']
  threshold_value decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score threshold that determines whether an issue is considered material.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the assessment record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the assessment (e.g., v1.0).']

  Note: 'Master reference table for materiality_assessment. Referenced by materiality_assessment_id.'
}

Table shared.region {
  region_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for region']
  parent_region_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the immediate parent region in the geographic hierarchy.']
  area_sq_km decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total land area of the region expressed in square kilometres.']
  climate_zone varchar [note: 'Primary climate classification of the region.']
  code varchar [note: 'Internal alphanumeric code used to reference the region within the enterprise.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the region record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency code used for transactions in the region.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing additional context about the region.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the region became valid for business use.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the region ceases to be valid (null if open‑ended).']
  external_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier from external standards such as UN M49 or World Bank.']
  gdp_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated annual GDP of the region expressed in US dollars.']
  geographic_center_name varchar [note: 'Name of the city or landmark that best represents the region\'s center.']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'Numeric depth of the region within the geographic hierarchy (e.g., 1 = continent, 2 = country).']
  is_cross_border boolean [note: 'True if the region spans more than one sovereign country.']
  iso_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 3166‑1 country code for the country containing the region.']
  iso_region_code varchar [note: 'Standardized region code as defined by ISO 3166‑2.']
  latitude_center double [note: 'Latitude coordinate of the region\'s geographic centroid.']
  longitude_center double [note: 'Longitude coordinate of the region\'s geographic centroid.']
  median_income_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Median annual household income within the region, expressed in US dollars.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the region (e.g., "Midwest", "Bavaria").']
  population varchar [note: 'Estimated resident population of the region.']
  primary_language varchar [note: 'Most commonly spoken language in the region.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the region.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'IANA time‑zone identifier representing the primary time zone of the region.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category that defines the hierarchical level of the region.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the region record.']
  urbanization_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the region\'s population living in urban areas.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for region. Referenced by region_id.'
}
